info.english_meaning: to washto purifyto cleanseto nourish to support
info.hindI_arTa: SudDa karanA svacCa karanA pAlana karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: niNkte nenekti nenikte SocerTe pozaRe taTA ' (Slo. 63) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tasmAt pARI avanenevita' (Sa0 brA0 12123) SunDatItyAha prAyeRa nijirniHpUrvaH prayujyate atrAvapUrvaH arTe tu na kaScidviSezaH kevalamavaSabdaH SoDanajalasyAvapAtaM dyotayati
'anyatrApi--utsAdanaM ca gAtrARAM snApanocCizwaBojane na kuryAd guruputrasya pAdayoScAvanejanam' (manu0 2209).. avanejanam=prakzAlanam
'tasya (manoH) avanenijAnasya matsyaH pARI Apede' (Sa0 brA0 1811) avanenijAnasya=prakzAlayataH
'gAtrARi tABirnirRenikte' (kAWaka0 3411) ihopasargo DAtvarTAnuvAdI na viSezakaH nirRigiti pApaSoDane ulbaRe vAsasyalaNkaraRe vA dfSyate
'vfdDAtikramasaMBftasya mahato nirRiktaye pApmanaH prAyaScittamaTAdiSantu guravo rAmeRa dAntasya me' (mahAvIra0 425).. nirRiktiH SudDiH
'idamahataM vAsaH idaM niktam idaM ca nirRiktam' (iti vayam)
'sinDormaDyaM paretya vyanijamahervizam' (aTarva0 10419) vyanijam=aSUSuDam aSoDayam vipUrvAnnijerluNi aNi rUpam
